menu.tagline: A deck, a deal, and a quiet hour. Pick a game and play.

saved.title: Saved games
saved.emptyBody: Games you pause will wait for you here.

game.winSub: Level cleared — onward to the next.
game.notBuiltBody: This variant is coming soon. Play Klondike for now.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.p1: Solitaire is local-first. As a guest, everything — your games, progress, statistics, and settings — stays in your browser (IndexedDB). Nothing is sent to a server.
privacy.p2: If you create an account, we store your username, your email address, and your verified game results (scores, times, move counts) in order to run the global leaderboard.
privacy.p3: There are no ads, trackers, or analytics. Your email is used only to identify your account; it is never shown publicly or shared with anyone.
privacy.p4: You can delete your saved games and statistics from the app at any time. Deleting your account removes your server-side data as well.

terms.title: Terms
terms.p1: Solitaire is provided as-is, for fun, without warranty of any kind.
terms.p2: One account per person. Submitting manipulated or automated game results to the leaderboard is not allowed; the server independently verifies every submitted game and rejects anything it cannot reproduce.
terms.p3: We may remove leaderboard entries or accounts that abuse the service.
terms.p4: These terms may evolve as the game grows; significant changes will be announced in the app.

footer: Local play · the server keeps score
